project_type: Static HTML/CSS/JS streetwear site - no framework, no build step
test_framework: None - manual verification via file existence and content checks
verification_instructions: Verify all new HTML files exist, contain proper navbar/footer, link correct CSS/JS files. Verify Vote Up buttons have working JS. Verify all footer/nav links point to correct pages.
setup_instructions: No setup required - static HTML files
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no external package installs needed since this is a static site. Cannot fetch external resources at build time but Google Fonts links are fine in HTML (loaded by browser).
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: same navbar structure with SVG KREEP logo, same footer with updated links, same CSS class naming, same design token usage.
key_patterns: Navbar: header.nav with SVG logo, nav-links, cart dropdown. Footer: footer.footer with 4-col grid (brand, Shop links, Community links, newsletter). Product cards: article.product-card with .media, .sku, .meta, .size-row--card. Community cards: article.community-card with .media, .body, .vote section, Vote Up button. CSS uses BEM-like naming with design tokens from tokens.css. Pages link tokens.css, styles.css, pages.css in that order. JS is in a single IIFE in main.js.
directory_structure: Root: HTML pages. css/: tokens.css (design tokens), styles.css (components), pages.css (page layouts). js/: main.js (all interactions).
